nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel, saying, ‘Designate the cities of refuge, of which I spoke to you through Moses,

esv.text: “Say to the people of Israel, ‘Appoint the cities of refuge, of which I spoke to you through Moses,

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列人：‘你們要照著我藉著摩西命令你們的，為自己設立避難城，

ccb.text: “你吩咐以色列人，照我以前借摩西所吩咐你们的，设立一些城邑作为避难城，
